title: Executive Order 8736—Partial Revocation of Executive Order No. 5214 of October 30, 1929, Withdrawing Public Lands for Naval Purposes

flags.justification: This revokes a small (18-acre) land reservation, with a narrow, sensible provision retaining the Secretary of the Navy's regulatory authority over ingress and egress to protect the Navy's continuing nearby interest.
A land-status revocation creating no compliance regime.
No compliance regime is created by this order.
A revocation action returning land to normal status, not a continuing authority grant.
No existing oversight mechanism is removed.
No compliance regime is created by this order.
An extremely narrow, tiny-scale (18-acre) technical land action.
No second agency's competing mandate is implicated.
No coverage population or exemption structure is created.
